THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, DEXTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE. $2,619.67 RENT, $465.00 COSTS, $2,670.03 HOLDOVER CHARGES, $947.47 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,807.23, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
